## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Refactor / code quality
- [ ] Documentation / tests only

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for every changed behaviour
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`composer test`)
- [ ] Code style passes (`vendor/bin/pint --test`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (handled automatically by semantic-release on merge)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
